description: Building and enhancing an HR workflow automation platform where users configure process steps, validation logic, and approval criteria through a visual canvas. Delivering scalable Angular 21 features using Signals and NgRx, while contributing to backend integrations with Go, Redis, and AWS S3.

Developed reusable frontend packages including a Nepali BS Date Picker built with TypeScript and Rollup. Contributed to multi-tenant attendance and enrollment workflows, component standardization, and production-ready feature delivery in cross-functional teams.

Built dynamic form systems using Angular Reactive Forms with custom validators for clinical and operational workflows. Implemented lazy loading, secure authentication, role-based authorization, and robust API/database integrations across large-scale hospital management modules.
